subject: Quick hero idea for Kylie Cosmetics
body:
Hi,

I was looking at Kylie Cosmetics and had a great idea for your hero section.

I design a lot of websites with interactive hero sections (3D/scrolling/video-style product stories). If you're interested, I can mock up a new hero for you for free.

If you like it, you can pay me after it's done.

If you'd like examples first, you can check out https://vobiuslabs.com to see some projects.

If you're open to it, reply YES and tell me which product you want featured, and I’ll send over a concept.

Thanks,
Jarvis
notes: Skincare/cosmetics — offer free interactive hero concept, pay after if they like it.
